flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Maine Community College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (24.3% → 19.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Southern Maine Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (21.2% vs 29.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Maine Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Maine Community College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2k → 5.7k).
